_pipeline: ingest -> materialize_graph -> create_train_gpickle -> embed_esm2 -> train_gnn -> bootstrap_cis
_task: Protein_HAS_DOMAIN_Domain link prediction, 10% hold-out test set (20% combined val+test), seed=42
_graph_version: 28 foundational systems (ISCro4 added; IS622 deprecated alias), 11763 train nodes, 11817 edges
_note: GNNs are statistically tied (delta=0.0024, overlapping 95% CIs). Node2Vec excluded from primary benchmark - topology only, no ESM-2 features. Both GNN models within v0.7.0 CIs.

gat.note: Residual connections required to prevent embedding collapse on sparse bipartite edges

node2vec_inductive.note: Train-walk only (test/val edges withheld from random walks). Topology without ESM-2 features. Excluded from primary table.

node2vec_transductive.note: Supplementary only - random walks see all edges including test edges. Incomparable to inductive GNNs. Carried forward from v0.6.0.

structure_structure_of_protein.note: Secondary edge type; Structure->Protein link prediction

quantum_kernel.note: node_classification_not_link_prediction - supplementary only, carried forward from v0.6.0

classical_rbf.note: node_classification_not_link_prediction - supplementary only, carried forward from v0.6.0
